name: baguwen
description: Knowledge-base oral quiz (八股): the agent quizzes the user chapter-by-chapter, probes weak points, and logs blind spots.
trigger: When the user enters 八股 (interview) mode on an open chapter.
notes_format: 问题 / 用户回答 / 缺口 / 正确要点
constraints: read-only except appending the blind-spot notes file
